protein_name: May play an role in the regulation of Ins(1,4,5)P3 around the endoplasmic reticulum. 3 alternatively spliced human isoforms have been reported. Note: This description may include information from UniProtKB.

raw_fields.Molecular Function: GABA receptor binding; inositol 1,4,5 trisphosphate binding; phosphatidylinositol-4,5-bisphosphate phospholipase C activity; phosphoric diester hydrolase activity; protein binding
raw_fields.Biological Process: gamma-aminobutyric acid signaling pathway; intracellular signal transduction; lipid metabolic process; negative regulation of cold-induced thermogenesis; phosphatidylinositol metabolic process; phosphatidylinositol-mediated signaling; regulation of synaptic transmission, GABAergic; release of sequestered calcium ion into cytosol; signal transduction
raw_fields.Alt. Names/Synonyms: FLJ13484; Inactive phospholipase C-like protein 2; KIAA1092; phospholipase C like 2; phospholipase C, epsilon 2; Phospholipase C-epsilon-2; Phospholipase C-L2; phospholipase C-like 2; PLC-epsilon-2; PLC-L(2); PLC-L2; PLCE2; PLCL2
raw_fields.Basal Isoelectric point: 6.47 Predict pI for various phosphorylation states
